title: The Anusandhan National Research Foundation Act, 2023
full_text: The Anusandhan National Research Foundation Act, 2023 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 202325 Act Number: 25 Enactment Date: 2023-08-12 Act Year: 2023 Short Title: The Anusandhan National Research Foundation Act, 2023 Long Title: An Act to establish the Anusandhan National Research Foundation to provide high level strategic direction for research, innovation and entrepreneurship in the fields of natural sciences including mathematical sciences, engineering and technology, environmental and earth sciences, health and agriculture, and scientific and technological interfaces of humanities and social sciences, to promote, monitor and provide support as required for such research and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Science and Technology Department: Department of Science and Technology Enforcement Date: 5-02-2024 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Anusandhan National Research Foundation Act, 2023 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II ANUSANDHAN NATIONAL RESEARCH FOUNDATION CHAPTER III FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOU Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of Foundation. Section 4. Objectives of Foundation. Section 5. Governing Board. Section 6. Meetings of Governing Board. Section 7. Executive Council. Section 8. Meetings of Executive Council. Section 9. Vacancies, etc., not to invalidate proceedings of Governing Board or Executive Council. Section 10. Functions of Executive Council. Section 11. Chief Executive Officer and other officers and employees of Foundation. Section 12. Constitution of Committees. Section 13. Funds of Foundation. Section 14. Budget. Section 15. Annual report. Section 16. Accounts and audit. Section 17. Annual report and auditor's report to be laid before Parliament. Section 18. Certification and report to be furnished. Section 19. Power of Governing Board to delegate. Section 20. Power of Governing Board to issue directions. Section 21. Application of other laws not barred. Section 22. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 23. Power to make rules. Section 24. Power of Executive Council to make regulations. Section 25. Rules and regulations to be laid before Parliament. Section 26. Power to remove difficulties. Section 27. Repeal and savings.
